text:
Created attachment 203046
add flavors

I have added a patch which introduces FLAVORS

* @nagios3 (default)
* @nagios4

For portlint:

* move USES up in Makefile
* add a WWW link to pkg-descr

Tests have been carried out with poudriere testport with:

* no flavor
* @nagios3
* @nagios4
